title: The monday.com work management demo

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Get started with monday’s work management product!

For all new monday.com members and those that just need a basic refresher, our work management product demo is now on-demand for you to watch anytime, anywhere.

The work management demo is a great entry into the world of monday.com! In this demo, our team will walk you through the most important features available in the work management product, using a simple use case to bring it to life.

Any questions? Ask below!
